from dsl import *
from constants import *


def solve_db3e9e38(I):
    x1 = ofcolor(I, SEVEN)
    x2 = lrcorner(x1)
    x3 = shoot(x2, UP_RIGHT)
    x4 = shoot(x2, NEG_UNITY)
    x5 = combine(x3, x4)
    x6 = rbind(shoot, UP)
    x7 = mapply(x6, x5)
    x8 = last(x2)
    x9 = rbind(subtract, x8)
    x10 = chain(even, x9, last)
    x11 = fill(I, EIGHT, x7)
    x12 = sfilter(x7, x10)
    O = fill(x11, SEVEN, x12)
    return O
